packages.name: @decantr/ui
packages.replacement: @decantr/css, @decantr/cli, and the hosted Decantr registry/API surfaces
packages.message: @decantr/ui has been retired from the active Decantr vNext product surface. Use @decantr/css, @decantr/cli, and the hosted Decantr registry/API surfaces instead.

packages.message: @decantr/ui-chart has been retired from the active Decantr vNext product surface. Use @decantr/css, @decantr/cli, and compiled execution-pack workflows instead.
